name: Hustronix Daily Research Pipeline
description: Daily source ingestion, research extraction, and content ideation for Marketing OS in D:\content

prompts.text:
Run the Hustronix Marketing OS daily pipeline in workspace D:\content.

1. Read skill source-ingestion — check for unprocessed raw_sources
2. Read skill research-agent — extract insights from processed=0 sources, write vault/insights/
3. Read skill content-strategist — generate 3-5 ideas, update review/queue.md
4. Run: python scripts/daily_digest.py
5. If Slack MCP connected, post summary to #marketing-os. Otherwise the digest file is enough.

Follow hustronix-brand.mdc rules. Enforce 40/40/20 source mix.
